channel.title: Htb on d3vilsec
channel.description: Recent content in Htb on d3vilsec

item.title: HTB: Facts
item.description: Walkthrough of the Hack The Box machine Facts — a Camaleon CMS privilege-escalation CVE leaks S3 credentials, a MinIO bucket gives up an SSH key, and a sudo-able facter binary loads a custom fact to land root.

item.title: HTB: Cap
item.description: Walkthrough of the Hack The Box machine Cap — an IDOR-style pcap leak gives up FTP creds, and a Linux capability on python3.8 hands over root.
